title: Home Screen - Device is up to date - Both earbuds are connected
scenario: Verify that the Lens App Status Box displays battery levels, connected status, and device image for up-to-date Osprey earbuds, with case field shown (unlike Tern), and tapping reveals software version.
steps: Ensure Osprey earbuds are updated to the newest firmware.
Take both earbuds out of the case.
Observe the Status Box in the app.
Tap the Status Box to reveal additional details.
expected: The Lens App Status Box shows "Left", "Right", and "Case" fields with battery level and green indicator; "Status" field with "connected" status and green indicator; and an image of the device showing left and right earbuds. After tapping the Status Box, the "Software" field is revealed with software version and green indicator.
